README.md.reason: Established the Factory and product authority boundary.

CONTEXT.md.reason: Kept product and Factory terminology within their owning boundaries.

CONTRIBUTING.md.reason: Required evidence-backed review and separation of Factory artifacts.

playbooks/devin-bicameral-factory-run.md.reason: Defined implementation, validation, attestation, and draft-PR requirements.

blueprints/factory-run-signals/artifact-.reason: Kept raw receipts and dogfood notes out of the product diff.

blueprints/factory-run-signals/domain-en.reason: Confirmed the assembler introduces no reusable domain entity.

blueprints/factory-run-signals/factory-l.reason: Required reporting the attestation filename contract mismatch as evidence.

blueprints/factory-run-signals/minimum-p.reason: Set the deterministic validation floor for contributor tooling.

blueprints/topology-execution.md.reason: Defined receipt semantics and prohibited an unadmitted host attempt.

skills/bic/topology-execution/SKILL.md.reason: Required exact revisions, bounded execution, fail-closed evidence, and cleanup proof.

skills/bic/pre-pr-factory-attestation/SK.reason: Defined this pre-PR provenance record and validation step.

docs/governance/factory-dispatch-control.reason: Confirmed that issue approval cannot replace the unavailable controller-backed DispatchGrant.

invariants: No canonical state, authority, or persistence semantics changed.
Supporting or synthetic evidence cannot become terminal host acceptance.
The assembler cannot grant admission or replace named human product review.

minimization_review.rationale: The patch deterministically assembles and validates evidence; it adds no product lifecycle state or authority.
